pattern: Track row and column increment counts separately; a cell has an odd value when the sum of its row count and column count is odd.
hints: Each index operation increments an entire row and an entire column; track how many times each row and column is incremented.
Cell (r, c) has value row_count[r] + col_count[c]; it is odd when exactly one of those counts is odd.
Count rows with odd increment count (R) and columns with odd count (C); the answer is R*(n-C) + (m-R)*C.

edge_inputs.description: single increment on row 0, col 0 of 2x2
same row and column incremented twice (even), all zero
repeated indices cancel each other out
all indices on the same row

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    m = rng.randint(1, 50)
    n = rng.randint(1, 50)
    q = min(100, max(1, size))
    indices = [[rng.randint(0, m-1), rng.randint(0, n-1)] for _ in range(q)]
    return [m, n, indices]
